title: Backported Shelves
description: A server-side datapack for Filament that adds shelves from the 2025 fall drop!
body: ![Banner header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c0fe18c18e45c8e8b239eeb3717cdb6937954c6.png) ## It's Okay to be Shelfish! If you've been excitedly waiting the upcoming shelves, or if you are unable to update to newer versions, this is for you! This is my attempt to bring the new shelves early, **completely server-side**, powered by **[Filament](https://modrinth.com/mod/filament)**. ![A small shop using shelves to display the items they sell.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b56c2425e820439129f1b0a6c1322bee00eaabff.png) ![An olympics-inspired quartz pillar torch build using shelves.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c56b9506b61aafb01bb9cf2e326cc6b99978f01_0.webp) ## How to Use This mod requires **[Filament](https://modrinth.com/mod/filament)** and **[Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)** to function, both of which are only required server-side. For the pack's resources to function correctly, you will also need to set `"enabled": false` to `true` under `/config/polymer/auto-host.json`. If you are having problems with placing/breaking sounds (1.21.5+), you can also set `"always_handle_vanilla_block_sounds": false` to `true` under `/config/polymer/sound-patch.json`. ## Features & Incapabilities Though this datapack currently implements the display functionality of the new shelf block, it does **not** yet implement the redstone locking or hotbar switching features that have been showcased in snapshots. ## Credits Assets used from **Minecraft** ## You May Also Like [![Rail Recipe Rebalance Mod Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qzAj3Hc0/abafaaaadce20efbf758471f3ac4b61df96653d2_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rail-recipe-rebalance) [](https://modrinth.com/datapack/planked-chests)
